feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Add a copy email when a PRItem is release to email group
entry.content:
Hello
I am hoping you can help me, I am new to SAP S4 but have worked on "other" packages, we have SAP Private cloud editions
I am configuring a Flexible Workflow for PRItem release.

When the workflow has completed I want to send an email notification to the team that convert a PR to A PO.
I can not see how to add this in the maintain workflow, flexible workflow scenario editor, nor in Email Templates, how is this achieved please?

entry.title: Does SAP HANA trial supports trigger
entry.content:
hello, I'm currenting testing a SAP HANA trial instance. 

I always get strange syntax error when I execute SQL to create trigger on my table. 

Could you confirm if trigger is supported in the trial version? If not, is there a way for me to test this in the trial version?

Here are my testing queries:

 


-- Step 1: Create a Table to Track Changes
CREATE TABLE CUSTOMER (
CUSTOMER_ID INT PRIMARY KEY,
CUSTOMER_NAME VARCHAR(100),
CUSTOMER_ADDRESS VARCHAR(255)
);

-- Step 2: Create a Change Tracking Table (Audit Table)
CREATE TABLE CUSTOMER_CHANGE_LOG (
LOG_ID INTEGER GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY,
CUSTOMER_ID INT,
CHANGE_TYPE VARCHAR(10), -- Values: 'INSERT', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'
OLD_CUSTOMER_NAME VARCHAR(100),
NEW_CUSTOMER_NAME VARCHAR(100),
OLD_CUSTOMER_ADDRESS VARCHAR(255),
NEW_CUSTOMER_ADDRESS VARCHAR(255),
CHANGE_TIMESTAMP TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Step 3: Create Triggers for INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE
-- Trigger to Capture INSERT Operations
CREATE TRIGGER CUSTOMER_AFTER_INSERT
AFTER INSERT ON CUSTOMER
FOR EACH ROW
BEGIN
INSERT INTO CUSTOMER_CHANGE_LOG (CUSTOMER_ID, CHANGE_TYPE, NEW_CUSTOMER_NAME, NEW_CUSTOMER_ADDRESS)
VALUES (new.CUSTOMER_ID, 'INSERT', new.CUSTOMER_NAME, new.CUSTOMER_ADDRESS);
END;

entry.title: Mass upload of consumption data history for multiple materials
entry.content:
Hello,

To initiate a forecast, we currently navigate to Material Change App > Forecast View > Consumption. However, we need a way to upload consumption data for multiple materials in bulk, rather than manually entering consumption data for each period through the Material Change App. Is there a way to achieve this in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

entry.title: Multiple Email notifications
entry.content:
I have a sap ariba account with email notifications enabled. Recently I have been facing an issue with the number of emails received. The same email is being sent to my account multiple times within the same minute.
It's not an email delivery issue, and it only occurs with my user (admin account) - the other users set to receive email notifications do not have this issue.

entry.title: SAC/SAP S4/HANA EXCEL EXPORT AND IMPORT
entry.content:
Hi team,

I am having an issue of toughts because it was given to me a database on SAP S4/HANA to export data to an excel and then import to SAC, but all the data is accumulated and they asked me to present by each month and year. First i tried to export each month by itself, but when i get to February the data of that month comes with january too, so that outcome its not possible, so i tried to add and Calculated measure, the idea was "if the date was = to 202402 the measure on the excel of february would subtract to the measure of the excel file of january so i only had the numbers of february, but i tried everything and i couldnt reach an out come by using all the commands of SAC.

If anyone could help me i would eternly gratefull.

Have a blessing day

PS: I will leave here an print of the excel. This excel doesnt have an date registered on it, i know the month because o filter them in SAP before i export.

 

Bernardo Santos

entry.title: Empties Management Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

We have an urgent client requirement in our empties management module(in SD-MM module)

Point no 1: Empties Balance Standard Report

Point no 2: Empties Security & Deposits process steps

Example for point no 1: Customer sends 100 Qty goods & they return 80 Qty material so my empties balance has to be shown as 20 qty in a standard report, Please let me know if there is any standard report or T-code which can show me the empties balance.

Example for point no 2: Please let me know how deposit or security process is operated in empties management.

 

Thanks & Regards

Sony 

(SD Consultant)

entry.title: Serial number prefix in MM
entry.content:
Hi Members 

I have the challenge that I need to add a prefix to my serial numbers, when I create a new purchase order, so far I have created a new category and a number range.  

I also created a serial number profile in MM and maintained my prefix, the issue is, that when I create a new PO in ME21N, the correct number range are picked but without prefix, it is important that the supplier got the information about the prefix, so how to show the serial number incl. prefix in ME21N and the output form?

Any ideas?

entry.title: Blocked Transactions SAP ME / HANA
entry.content:
Hi 

We have some problems with SAP ME and SAP MII, for a few moments, the system becomes slow

We review in the SAP Hana Cockpit tool, and we can see some Blocked Transactions, the main blockeds are following: 

We can see this top 3 queries in the tool

1.- UPDATE SFC_ROUTER SET QTY=?
WHERE HANDLE=? 

2.-SELECT MODIFIED_DATE_TIME,
START_DATE_TIME,
STRT,
HANDLE
FROM RESOURCE_TIME_LOG
WHERE RESOURCE_BO=?
AND ACTIVE=? forUPDATE 

3.- SELECT MODIFIED_DATE_TIME,
START_DATE_TIME,
HANDLE,
RESOURCE_STATE,
STRT
FROM RESOURCE_TIME_LOG
WHERE RESOURCE_BO=?
AND ACTIVE=? forUPDATE 

One question, This queries are standard?

Any idea to identify where it is executed from? 

Regards

entry.title: ERROR when Deploying to HANA cloud database with csv like db.evaluation-Frequencies_texts_ar.csv
entry.content:
[2024-11-09 14:45:54 +0000] Batch[0]: {"logger":"nodejs-logger","type":"log","component_type":"application","component_id":"01b0820b-57b3-43bb-a194-34f8ebd32606","component_name":"evaluation-mtx-sidecar-0193115e-bf23-6420-c3df-65e29a3a5d6a","layer":"[NODEJS]","organization_name":"1sm-development-us30","organization_id":"9a8dacf1-a05d-46ed-9d27-dea0ccbc29a8","space_name":"1sm-dev-us30","space_id":"4447c158-4cf7-4904-b1ee-f1457eddcd80","container_id":"10.5.9.10","msg":"{\"id\":92,\"origin\":\"server\",\"request_id\":38142,\"row_id\":92,\"level\":4,\"type\":\"PLUGIN\",\"library_id\":\"com.sap.hana.di.tabledata\",\"plugin_id\":\"com.sap.hana.di.tabledata\",\"path\":\"src/gen/data/db.evaluation-Frequencies_texts_ar.hdbtabledata\",\"severity\":\"INFO\",\"message_code\":8251555,\"message\":\"Inserted 4 records of the data source file \\\"db.evaluation-Frequencies_texts_ar.csv\\\" into the target table \\\"DB_EVALUATION_FREQUENCIES_TEXTS\\\"\",\"location\":\"14:26\",\"location_path\":\"\",\"timestamp_utc\":\"2024-11-09 14:45:54.540917000\"}","level":"error","written_at":"2024-11-09T14:45:54.634Z","written_ts":1731163554635001000,"customFields":"{\"tenantId\":\"659fd1f1-c85e-4881-8097-07f6b445ebf3\"}"}
[2024-11-09 14:45:54 +0000] Batch[0]: {"logger":"nodejs-logger","type":"log","component_type":"application","component_id":"01b0820b-57b3-43bb-a194-34f8ebd32606","component_name":"evaluation-mtx-sidecar-0193115e-bf23-6420-c3df-65e29a3a5d6a","layer":"[NODEJS]","organization_name":"1sm-development-us30","organization_id":"9a8dacf1-a05d-46ed-9d27-dea0ccbc29a8","space_name":"1sm-dev-us30","space_id":"4447c158-4cf7-4904-b1ee-f1457eddcd80","container_id":"10.5.9.10","msg":"{\"id\":93,\"origin\":\"server\",\"request_id\":38142,\"row_id\":93,\"level\":3,\"type\":\"HDI\",\"library_id\":\"com.sap.hana.di.tabledata\",\"plugin_id\":\"com.sap.hana.di.tabledata\",\"path\":\"src/gen/data/db.evaluation-Frequencies_texts_ar.hdbtabledata$0.expand\",\"severity\":\"INFO\",\"message_code\":8212122,\"message\":\"Deploying \\\"src/gen/data/db.evaluation-Frequencies_texts_ar.hdbtabledata$0.expand\\\"... ok\",\"location\":\"0:0\",\"location_path\":\"\",\"timestamp_utc\":\"2024-11-09 14:45:54.540944000\"}","level":"error","written_at":"2024-11-09T14:45:54.634Z","written_ts":1731163554635070000,"customFields":"{\"tenantId\":\"659fd1f1-c85e-4881-8097-07f6b445ebf3\"}"}
[2024-11-09 14:45:54 +0000] Batch[0]: {"logger":"nodejs-logger","type":"log","component_type":"application","component_id":"01b0820b-57b3-43bb-a194-34f8ebd32606","component_name":"evaluation-mtx-sidecar-0193115e-bf23-6420-c3df-65e29a3a5d6a","layer":"[NODEJS]","organization_name":"1sm-development-us30","organization_id":"9a8dacf1-a05d-46ed-9d27-dea0ccbc29a8","space_name":"1sm-dev-us30","space_id":"4447c158-4cf7-4904-b1ee-f1457eddcd80","container_id":"10.5.9.10","msg":"{\"id\":94,\"origin\":\"server\",\"request_id\":38142,\"row_id\":94,\"level\":2,\"type\":\"HDI\",\"library_id\":\"\",\"plugin_id\":\"\",\"path\":\"\",\"severity\":\"ERROR\",\"message_code\":8212102,\"message\":\"Processing work list... failed\",\"location\":\"0:0\",\"location_path\":\"\",\"timestamp_utc\":\"2024-11-09 14:45:54.542754000\"}","level":"error","written_at":"2024-11-09T14:45:54.634Z","written_ts":1731163554635121400,"customFields":"{\"tenantId\":\"659fd1f1-c85e-4881-8097-07f6b445ebf3\"}"}
[2024-11-09 14:45:54 +0000] Batch[0]: {"logger":"nodejs-logger","type":"log","component_type":"application","component_id":"01b0820b-57b3-43bb-a194-34f8ebd32606","component_name":"evaluation-mtx-sidecar-0193115e-bf23-6420-c3df-65e29a3a5d6a","layer":"[NODEJS]","organization_name":"1sm-development-us30","organization_id":"9a8dacf1-a05d-46ed-9d27-dea0ccbc29a8","space_name":"1sm-dev-us30","space_id":"4447c158-4cf7-4904-b1ee-f1457eddcd80","container_id":"10.5.9.10","msg":"{\"id\":95,\"origin\":\"server\",\"request_id\":38142,\"row_id\":95,\"level\":2,\"type\":\"SUMMARY\",\"library_id\":\"\",\"plugin_id\":\"\",\"path\":\"\",\"severity\":\"INFO\",\"message_code\":8211557,\"message\":\"Make failed (4 errors, 0 warnings): tried to deploy 2 files, undeploy 0 files, redeploy 106 dependent files\",\"location\":\"0:0\",\"location_path\":\"\",\"timestamp_utc\":\"2024-11-09 14:45:54.545084000\"}","level":"error","written_at":"2024-11-09T14:45:54.634Z","written_ts":1731163554635164400,"customFields":"{\"tenantId\":\"659fd1f1-c85e-4881-8097-07f6b445ebf3\"}"}
[2024-11-09 14:45:54 +0000] Batch[0]: {"logger":"nodejs-logger","type":"log","component_type":"application","component_id":"01b0820b-57b3-43bb-a194-34f8ebd32606","component_name":"evaluation-mtx-sidecar-0193115e-bf23-6420-c3df-65e29a3a5d6a","layer":"[NODEJS]","organization_name":"1sm-development-us30","organization_id":"9a8dacf1-a05d-46ed-9d27-dea0ccbc29a8","space_name":"1sm-dev-us30","space_id":"4447c158-4cf7-4904-b1ee-f1457eddcd80","container_id":"10.5.9.10","msg":"{\"id\":96,\"origin\":\"server\",\"request_id\":38142,\"row_id\":96,\"level\":1,\"type\":\"HDI\",\"library_id\":\"\",\"plugin_id\":\"\",\"path\":\"\",\"severity\":\"ERROR\",\"message_code\":8211605,\"message\":\"Making... failed\",\"location\":\"0:0\",\"location_path\":\"\",\"timestamp_utc\":\"2024-11-09 14:45:54.545132000\"}","level":"error","written_at":"2024-11-09T14:45:54.634Z","written_ts":1731163554635228400,"customFields":"{\"tenantId\":\"659fd1f1-c85e-4881-8097-07f6b445ebf3\"}"}

 

Can you please give me an idea how to solve this issue? Thank you.

entry.title: How to load column table data into hdb collection
entry.content:
Hi,

I understood, we can easily generate the json base on 'for json' function. But how can i store the result set into hdb collection?

 

select 'myvalue' as "key" from dummy for json;

 i tried to use, seems not working

 

insert into myCollection values (select 'myValue' as "key" from dummy for json);

entry.title: Very less space released after performing the De-fragmentation in HANA DB of *** system
entry.content:
We had performed Disk Defragmentation in PERSON_NAME DB of *** system.
But very less space was released even after running the fragmentation overhead to 105%.

help to reduce the fragmentation and get the unused space released.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Advance Payment Ariba
entry.content: Hello everyone, I would like to ask if advance payments are available with Arriba through s4hana public Cloud.

entry.title: Regarding to In-app extensibility
entry.content:
Dear All.

I want to know about In-app extensibility.

Is it possible to add a new item?
Is it possible to perform input check processing using the newly created items?
When defining F1Help for an item, is it possible to change the content of the output depending on the values of other items (profit centers, etc.)?
Can we then create a table (or CDSView) for the newly created items?
Also, is it possible to express a hierarchy on the table?

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: BADI to update partner profit center while creating journal Entries
entry.content:
I have a requirement in SAP Public cloud where while creating journal entry via creating incoming invoice, the input Partner Profit center should get copied form line item 002 to line item 001.

The BADI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION does not work because line item 001 gets created before 002.

Please help me with the same

entry.title: Embeded PP/DS in SAP Public Cloud Edition 2408
entry.content:
Hi

I would like to know if PP/DS is embedded in SAP Public Cloud Edition 2408 as we are unable to achieve capacity optimisation without aka APO PP/DS. 

I can see Advance Planning option in material master but it is not activated.

Please guide if this feature is available and how to activate advance planning.

entry.title: CDS view required for Material Classification characteristics in Public Cloud environment
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working in a public cloud environment and I need a standard CDS View to get the material classification characteristics.

I have found the CDS View for Material Class and Characteristics separately. But I don't have the link between them. Request you to kindly help with your expertise.

CDS View for Material Class - I_ClfnClassForKeyDate

CDS View for Material characteristics - I_ClfnCharacteristic.

I need the CDS view link for Material, Class, Characteristics, and characteristic names. Below is the sample screenshot of what I need.

Thank you in advance. Your inputs are highly appreciated.

entry.title: SAP HCM for SAP Cloud Private Edition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have spent many days exploring documentation on RISE with SAP and the conversion guides for transitioning for SAP ERP to SAP Hana Cloud Private Edition. Globally I do have an overview of how this is working and what are the steps to be taken for the conversion process. 

The scenario I do not understand regarding the conversion process is when SAP ERP system is used for different modules like FI, CO, SD, MM and also HCM within the same client and the business need is to only migrate HCM to SAP Cloud Private Edition  and keep the rest of the modules (FI, SD, MM ) as they are on the SAP ERP system. Is it possible to only migrate HCM to SAP Cloud Private Edition or the whole SAP ERP system should be converted including all modules?  during the conversion process is there any step where only specific modules and application can be selected for the conversion?

Many thanks

Rachid.

entry.title: Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?

This is the red line in the image.

If it cannot be done without UI Adaptation support, how do I search for apps that UI Adaptation supports?

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: High CPU Utilization and latency in calls after changing the app to new Hana cloud DB
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

recently , we changed the SAP Hana Cloud for one of the CAP Service

we created new HDI Container and and Schema and unbinded the old HDI Container and binded for new HDI and Schema and Restarted the app and deployed the new Hana DB Artifacts to HDI

We are Experiencing High CPU Utilization , any suggestions and steps to be done for bringing CPU Utilization , its going around 80% some times leading to high latency in calls 

In our Solution we are replication tables from ECC System in HANA CLOUD and exposing them as capm service , CPU Utilization is more than 40% expected

entry.title: S4HPC Sending Mails Using SMTP CL_BCS_MAIL_MESSAGE Email does not arrived
entry.content:
Hi.

My problem is the following. 

I am in S4HANA Public Cloud using Embedded Extensibility want to sent email with binary attachment. 

I do it along to the following documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/8d1f989deca1455dabc3d81b433fbdaf.html

My code is below. 

    TRY.
        DATA(lo_mail) = cl_bcs_mail_message=>create_instance( ).
        lo_mail->set_sender( 'dummy1@sap.com' ).
        lo_mail->add_recipient( 'dummy2@sap.com' ).
        lo_mail->set_subject( 'Test Mail' ).
        lo_mail->set_main( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_text_html( '<h1>Hello</h1><p>This is a test mail.</p>' ) ).
        lo_mail->add_attachment( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_text_plain(
          iv_content      = 'This is a text attachment'
          iv_filename     = 'Text_Attachment.txt'
        ) ).
        lo_mail->add_attachment( cl_bcs_mail_textpart=>create_instance(
          iv_content      = '<note><to>John</to><from>Jane</from><body>My nice XML!</body></note>'
          iv_content_type = 'text/xml'
          iv_filename     = 'Text_Attachment.xml'
        ) ).

        DATA(lo_mail_status_monitor) = lo_mail->send( ).

        lo_mail_status_monitor->get_email_status(
          IMPORTING
            es_mail_status         = DATA(ls_mail_status)
            et_recipients_statuses = DATA(lt_recipients_statuses) ).

        "handle exceptions here
      CATCH cx_bcs_mail INTO DATA(lx_mail).
    ENDTRY.
    COMMIT WORK.

I receive successful email sending status.

Email Monitor says email is delivered.

But message does not arrive my mailbox. 

It looks everything is fine, but eventually it does not work 

Does anybody can support me here?

Thanks

Vitali
